title: Decision: sniff_image_mime magic byte checks are correct
description: The sniff_image_mime() function in src/media.rs correctly identifies PNG (\x89PNG), JPEG (\xff\xd8\xff), GIF (GIF8), and WebP (RIFF....WEBP). The WebP check correctly validates both the RIFF marker at bytes 0-3 and the WEBP marker at bytes 8-11, guarding against files that start with RIFF but aren't WebP. The minimum length check (4 bytes) is sufficient because the WebP branch separately checks bytes.len() >= 12 before indexing. No issues found.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
